# glama-status-mcp -- Full Corpus

A daily-refreshed Glama TDQS score tracker for MCP fleets.
Scrapes per-tool grades from glama.ai, stores in SQLite with snapshot
history for delta tracking, surfaces via MCP tools, Prefab cards, a
6-page web dashboard, and an LLM-powered chat interface.

## Architecture

```
glama-status-mcp/
├── src/glama_status_mcp/
│   ├── server.py    -- FastMCP + FastAPI: 7 tools + 2 prompts
│   ├── scraper.py   -- Async HTML scraper for glama.ai score pages
│   ├── database.py  -- SQLite with 6 tables, snapshot + delta engine
│   ├── models.py    -- Pydantic models, fleet-repos.json loader
│   ├── llm.py       -- Glom-On auto-discovery + chat client
│   ├── reporting.py -- Per-repo markdown report generator
│   └── config.py    -- Paths, constants, env vars
├── webapp/          -- Vite + React + TailwindCSS v4
│   ├── src/
│   │   ├── components/ (12 components)
│   │   │   ├── Sidebar.tsx, ScoreTable.tsx, ToolBreakdown.tsx
│   │   │   ├── ReportView.tsx, ToolsPage.tsx
│   │   │   ├── ChatPage.tsx, HelpPage.tsx, SettingsPage.tsx
│   │   │   └── RefreshPanel.tsx
│   │   ├── store.ts, types.ts, index.css
│   │   └── main.tsx, App.tsx
│   ├── e2e/fleet-audit.spec.ts
│   └── playwright.config.ts, biome.json, vite.config.ts
├── native/          -- Tauri 2.0 wrapper
│   ├── src/main.rs, backend.rs
│   ├── tauri.conf.json, build.ps1, Cargo.toml
│   ├── windows/hooks.nsh, capabilities/default.json
│   └── icons/
├── config/          -- fleet-repos.json (user-editable)
├── reports/         -- Generated per-repo fix-todo reports
├── data/            -- SQLite database (gitignored)
├── tests/           -- 35 pytest tests
├── mcpb/            -- MCPB bundle assets
├── scripts/         -- refresh.py, smoke.py, register-daily-refresh.ps1
└── dist/            -- MCPB + Tauri build outputs
```

## MCP Tools

### glama_status (portmanteau, MUTATING)

| Operation | Description | Params |
|-----------|-------------|--------|
| `list` | All repos with grades, worst-first | -- |
| `get` | Per-tool breakdown for one repo | repo_name (required) |
| `worst_tools` | Lowest-scoring tools fleet-wide | limit (optional, default 50) |
| `refresh` | Rescrape all repos + snapshot | -- |
| `history` | Recent refresh log entries | limit (optional, default 10) |
| `staleness` | Repos >7 days since last scrape | -- |
| `report` | Full daily status report | -- |
| `deltas` | Score changes since last snapshot | -- |
| `add_repo` | Add a repo to track | repo_name (required) |
| `remove_repo` | Stop tracking a repo | repo_name (required) |
| `reload_config` | Reload fleet-repos.json | -- |

### glama_scores_summary (READ_ONLY)
Compact fleet-wide grade distribution and per-repo stats.

### glama_daily_report (READ_ONLY)
Full markdown report: grade table, score deltas, worst tools, stale repos.

### glama_agentic_analyze (MUTATING, requires ctx.sample)
Uses the connected LLM to analyze Glama scores and produce actionable fix
todos. Falls back gracefully to static analysis when sampling is unavailable.

### glama_generate_reports (MUTATING)
Writes per-repo markdown reports to `reports/` directory with tool-by-tool
breakdowns and fix todos. Pass `repo_name` for a single repo, omit for all.

### show_glama_status_card (Prefab, app=True)
Rich in-chat card showing grade distribution bars, per-repo scores, worst
tools fleet-wide, and stale repos.

### show_glama_repo_card (Prefab, app=True)
Per-repo breakdown card with overall grade, TDQS, coherence dimensions,
maintenance grade, and per-tool scores sorted worst-first.

## Prompts

### glama_improvement_plan(repo_name)
Docstring improvement plan with per-tool priorities, 6 dimension scores,
and a 6-step fix checklist.

### glama_fleet_analysis_prompt()
Fleet-wide health snapshot for LLM ingestion -- repo table, grade
distribution, stale repos list, and an analysis task prompt.

## REST API

| Method | Endpoint | Description |
|--------|----------|-------------|
| GET | `/health` | Server health check |
| GET | `/api/repos` | All repos with per-tool breakdowns |
| GET | `/api/repos/{name}` | Single repo tool breakdown |
| GET | `/api/worst-tools?limit=20` | Lowest-scoring tools fleet-wide |
| POST | `/api/refresh` | Trigger rescrape + snapshot |
| GET | `/api/history?limit=10` | Recent refresh log entries |
| GET | `/api/report` | Full daily report JSON |
| GET | `/api/deltas` | Score changes since last snapshot |
| GET | `/api/reports/generate?repo_name=X` | Generate markdown reports |
| GET | `/api/llm/providers` | Discovered LLM providers + models |
| POST | `/api/chat` | LLM chat with history + system prompt |
| POST | `/mcp` | MCP JSON-RPC transport |

## Database Schema (6 tables)

- `repos` -- Current per-repo scores, grades, coherence, maintenance
- `tools` -- Per-tool TDQS dimension scores (6 dimensions)
- `score_snapshots` -- One row per refresh run (uuid)
- `score_history` -- Denormalized per-repo per-snapshot
- `refresh_log` -- Timestamps and per-refresh success/failure counts
- `fleet_repos` -- Tracked repos with author namespace

## LLM Integration

Auto-discovers local LLM providers:
- Ollama: probes `127.0.0.1:11434/api/tags`
- LM Studio: probes `127.0.0.1:1234/v1/models`
- OpenAI: via `OPENAI_API_KEY` + `OPENAI_BASE_URL` env vars

Chat contract: `POST /api/chat` with `{message, model, base_url, provider,
system_prompt, context: {history: [{role, content}]}}`.

## Configuration

| File/Env | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| `config/fleet-repos.json` | Tracked repos with author, slug, active flag |
| `GLAMA_AUTHOR` | Default Glama namespace (default: sandraschi) |
| `GLAMA_SCRAPE_TIMEOUT` | HTTP timeout per scrape (default: 30s) |
| `GLAMA_SCRAPE_DELAY` | Delay between scrapes (default: 1.0s) |
| `GLAMA_USE_BRIGHTDATA` | Set to `1` for BrightData proxy |
| `GLAMA_BRIGHTDATA_TOKEN` | BrightData proxy auth token |
| `OPENAI_API_KEY` | OpenAI API key for cloud LLM |
| `OPENAI_BASE_URL` | OpenAI-compatible base URL |

## Scoring (Glama TDQS)

6 dimensions, weighted:
- Purpose Clarity (25%)
- Usage Guidelines (20%)
- Behavioral Transparency (20%)
- Parameter Semantics (15%)
- Conciseness & Structure (10%)
- Contextual Completeness (10%)

Server score = 60% weighted mean + 40% minimum. Grades: A>=3.5, B>=3.0,
C>=2.0, D>=1.0, F<1.0.

## Environment Variables for Claude Desktop

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "glama-status": {
      "command": "uv",
      "args": [
        "--directory", "C:\\path\\to\\glama-status-mcp",
        "run", "glama-status-mcp"
      ],
      "env": { "PYTHONUNBUFFERED": "1" }
    }
  }
}
```

## Ports

- Backend (FastAPI + MCP HTTP /mcp): 11072
- Frontend (Vite dev): 11073

## Docker (optional)

No Docker image published. The server runs natively on Windows/macOS/Linux
via Python 3.11+ and Node.js. Use `start.ps1` for one-click launch.

## Troubleshooting

**"No scores yet" on dashboard**: Run `just refresh` or click Refresh Now
to scrape Glama and populate the database.

**"No module named 'glama_status_mcp'"**: Run `uv sync --extra dev --extra web`
from the repo root.

**LLM chat shows "no provider detected"**: Start Ollama (`ollama serve`) or
LM Studio, or set `OPENAI_API_KEY` env var.

**New repo not showing**: Add it via `glama_status(add_repo, repo_name="...")`
or edit `config/fleet-repos.json`, then reload or restart.
